base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_1_3 — a tile (level_layout) from 1988 super mario bros 2. World 1-3 — ends with first Birdo boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World 1-3 — ends with first Birdo boss; Shy Guy-on-log water section
